services.description: Email read / search / send / label / thread.
Calendar events, availability, scheduling.
Task lists with completion state, due dates, nesting.
Obsidian-style markdown vault with frontmatter, wikilinks, tags.
Short-form messaging (iMessage, Messages).
Push notifications / ntfy / native notification centre.
Wire-level push transport — APNS, ntfy, OneSignal, Pushover. Distinct from notifications-v1 (in-app/operator notification semantics).
Social network posting / reading (Mastodon, Bluesky, etc.).
Hierarchical cloud file storage (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, iCloud Drive, SharePoint).
S3-compatible object/blob storage (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, MinIO).
Local filesystem.
Peer-to-peer file sync (Syncthing-shaped). Distinct from file-storage-v1 — symmetric mesh sync between paired devices.
Parcel delivery, tracking, shipment creation, pickup scheduling.
Internet service provider account (ABB, Aussie Broadband, etc.).
Authoritative DNS provider (Cloudflare DNS, Route53, Vultr DNS, DigitalOcean DNS).
Protective DNS / DNS filtering / managed resolver (Control-D, NextDNS, AdGuard).
Local network management (UniFi, similar).
Mesh VPN overlay (Tailscale, similar).
Low-earth-orbit satellite modem (Starlink).
Eventual-consistency key-value store (Cloudflare Workers KV, Deno KV, Upstash Redis-as-KV).
FaaS / edge compute (Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda, Vercel Functions, Deno Deploy). Bindings out of scope in v1.
Home automation hub (Home Assistant).
Gaming platform accounts (Steam, Xbox Live, PSN).
Double-entry accounting (Xero, QuickBooks).
SaaS billing (Paddle, Stripe Billing).
Payments, refunds, orders, customers, cards-on-file, POS, catalog, inventory, webhooks (Square, Stripe Payments, Adyen, Braintree).
E-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce).
Transactional email services (Resend, Postmark, SendGrid).
Stock / securities brokerage (IB, Saxo).
Developer documentation, API references, package registries, knowledge bases (read-only).
Unified compute — VM, container, LXC, and app workload lifecycle across Proxmox, TrueNAS, Docker, libvirt, and cloud VM providers (DD-157).
DEPRECATED — superseded by virtualisation-v1. VM lifecycle, GPU provisioning, cloud-init deployment (Vultr, DO, RunPod, Vast.ai). Existing packs continue to resolve via this alias.
Serverless GPU compute — endpoint deployment, job submission, streaming, queue management.
Inference API on a running GPU worker — model management, queue status, completion (DD-157).
Media server and automation stack (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Jellyfin, Plex) — library, requests, downloads (DD-157).
Travel search + booking — air, hotel, car (Sabre, Amadeus, Travelport).
Prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi).
Betting exchanges (Betfair).
